# GDriveSync

> GDriveSync is a VS Code extension and agent-friendly CLI for pulling Google Drive files into Markdown, CSV, Marp-flavored Markdown, and extracted local image assets with one-way sync.

## Canonical URLs

- Homepage: /
- Docs: /docs/
- Privacy: /privacy
- Full text for LLMs: /llms-full.txt
- Markdown docs mirror: /docs/index.md

## Primary product facts

- Google Drive is the source of truth
- Outputs are local files, not hosted documents
- Supports Google Docs, DOCX, Google Slides, PPTX, Google Sheets, and XLSX
- Markdown and Marp outputs can optionally use local OCR or direct provider-based image enrichment
- The hosted site is used for homepage, privacy policy, and Google Picker fallback only

## Primary docs

- /docs/#quick-start
- /docs/#extension
- /docs/#cli
- /docs/#auth
- /docs/#image-enrichment
- /docs/#troubleshooting
